headline: REST or GraphQL? Which to Choose?
caption:
Choosing between REST and GraphQL for your multi-client product depends on your needs. REST is straightforward and cache-friendly, ideal for simple data access. GraphQL allows clients to request exactly what they need, reducing over-fetching but requires more setup. Consider your team's expertise, client requirements, and future scalability. Sometimes a hybrid approach works best. Making the right choice will streamline development and improve user experience. 🔧💻
